plugins.prepareCmd: jq --arg v '${nextRelease.version}' '.version = $v' .claude-plugin/plugin.json > .tmp.json && mv .tmp.json .claude-plugin/plugin.json && jq --arg v '${nextRelease.version}' '.plugins[0].version = $v' .claude-plugin/marketplace.json > .tmp.json && mv .tmp.json .claude-plugin/marketplace.json && jq --arg v '${nextRelease.version}' '.version = $v' .codex-plugin/plugin.json > .tmp.json && mv .tmp.json .codex-plugin/plugin.json
